Item Type Metadata:Written Message:
Dear Soaks ( Pardon me Folks) :

Two more days and I'm through for two speedy weeks. 
Hot dog, yipee, and stuff - I can hardly wait. 

These past two week in the office have been worse than any I can remember since last fall. Besides
being unusually busy, they're putting an extension 
on our office and everything and everybody is up-
set.

I'm certainly looking forward to spending a few days on the Farm. It will be a grand change and rest.
See you Saturday - with bells on. 
Love, 
?
